generated_oml:
prefix base: http://example.org/base#
prefix DTDFVocab: http://example.org/dtdf#
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swinging motion"
]
instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed"
]
instance CartMotorPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures position of Cart Motor"
]
instance HoistMotorPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures position of Hoist Motor"
]
instance CartMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling horizontal movement of the crane cart"
]
instance HoistMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling vertical movement of the hoist"
]
instance TMC4671EvalMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller for precise stepper motor operation"
]
instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet at end of hoist for picking up containers"
]
instance ArduinoMicrocontroller : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Arduino microcontroller for sensor data acquisition and control of electromagnet and motor controllers"
]
instance LabScaleGantryCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane system inspired by harbor cranes in Antwerp, moving small pucks (representing containers) between locations. Physical side consists of crane hardware and controller forming a Cyber-Physical System.",
    base:contains SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, CartMotorPositionSensor, HoistMotorPositionSensor, CartMotor, HoistMotor, TMC4671EvalMotorController, Electromagnet, ArduinoMicrocontroller
]
instance DiscrepancyAlert : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alert when simulation-measurement discrepancies exceed thresholds"
]
instance OptimalTrajectoryRecommendation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal movement path for crane operation based on kinematic models"
]
instance DataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time insights from crane system visualization"
]
instance DataArchive : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical data archive for operational analysis"
]
instance SimulationResult : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive simulation results for crane behavior"
]
instance CorrectiveAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual operator intervention to correct system discrepancies",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance FutureEvolutionScenario : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Future evolution scenarios demonstrating DarTwin capabilities"
]
instance OptimalTrajectoryGeneration : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates optimal crane movement paths using kinematic models",
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryRecommendation
]
instance ContinuousValidation : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compares real-time measurements with simulations for continuous validation",
    DTDFVocab:provides DiscrepancyAlert
]
instance DataVisualization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualizes crane system data via Grafana dashboards",
    DTDFVocab:provides DataInsight
]
instance HistoricalDataLogging : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Logs historical crane operation data to TimescaleDB",
    DTDFVocab:provides DataArchive
]
instance CraneBehaviorSimulation : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates crane behavior for predictive analysis",
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResult
]
instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization platform for deploying DT components",
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGeneration, ContinuousValidation, DataVisualization, HistoricalDataLogging, CraneBehaviorSimulation
]
instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for historical data storage and SQL-based access",
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLogging
]
instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization tool for real-time and historical data dashboards",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualization
]
instance EclipseMosquittoMQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for lightweight communication between physical and virtual components",
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGeneration, ContinuousValidation, DataVisualization, HistoricalDataLogging, CraneBehaviorSimulation
]
instance PythonGantrylibModule : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python module for crane control and trajectory calculations",
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGeneration, CraneBehaviorSimulation
]
instance GitHub : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Repository hosting for version control and collaboration"
]
instance Fusion360CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model of the gantry crane created in Autodesk Fusion360",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GitHub
]
instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Mathematical model for trajectory optimization",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GitHub
]
instance SimulationServiceModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model for simulating crane behavior",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GitHub
]
instance CapellaModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Capella model for Model-Based Systems Engineering",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GitHub
]
instance DarTwinNotation : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DarTwin notation for system evolution",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GitHub
]
instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]
instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]
instance CartMotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CartMotorPositionSensor
]
instance HoistMotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HoistMotorPositionSensor
]
instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time swing angle measurements",
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]
instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time wind speed measurements",
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]
instance CartMotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time Cart Motor position measurements",
    DTDFVocab:fromData CartMotorPositionDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]
instance HoistMotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time Hoist Motor position measurements",
    DTDFVocab:fromData HoistMotorPositionDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]
instance TimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of crane operations stored in TimescaleDB",
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted, WindSpeedDataTransmitted, CartMotorPositionDataTransmitted, HoistMotorPositionDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, Grafana
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by the Trajectory Generator Service and Human Machine Interface are sent via the Control Application and Physical Crane Interface to the motor controllers and electromagnet for physical movement execution."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Five physical containers (Physical Crane, Crane Interface, Control Application, Logging Application, HMI) and six digital containers (Database, Dashboard, Trajectory Generator, Simulation Service, Continuous Validation Service, MQTT Broker) interconnected via MQTT and Python modules."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous Validation Service compares executed trajectory measurements with simulations, calculates distance metrics against an acceptable threshold; breaches trigger operator notifications via the dashboard."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol via Eclipse Mosquitto broker for communication between physical and digital components; data flows through Physical Crane Interface to Logging Application and database."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All components deployed on a personal computer using Docker containers for Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard; gantrylib Python module installed via pip for control applications."
]
